com.mentor.chs.api.event

Interface IXDesignModificationEvent


  • @NotToBeImplemented
public interface IXDesignModificationEvent
    This change event is notified when there is a modification in current design. Some of the possible cases are as following.

    1) Some objects of a design are modified.

    2) Some objects are delected from a design.

    3)Some new objects are added to the design.

    When above events happen this change event will be notified to the registered plugins.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods

      java.util.Set<IXObject> getNewObjects()
